item.title: ZenyumBright™ Active Whitening Serum 30ml

paragraph_list.text: *A buyer can only claim free gift product (Zenyum Sensitivity Toothpaste 100g) once per order.
Includes 1x ZenyumBright™ Active Whitening Serum 30ml
→ Benefits:
Up to 2 shades whiter*: Advanced whitening formula oxidises teeth stains and gradually brightens your smile
Non-invasive and enamel friendly: Peroxide-free and safe for daily use
Gentle and hydrating formula: Designed to whiten your teeth gently
Minty Cool: For that long lasting freshness
→ How to use:
Step 1 - Apply 1-2 pumps of serum to a pea-sized amount of toothpaste
Step 2 - Brush your teeth for 2 minutes, ensuring you cover all surfaces thoroughly
Step 3 - Expel excess and rinse after use
*Based on a 3-week study with once a day application. Individual results may vary.
Smile Tips!
Add ZenyumBright™ Active Whitening Serum to your toothpaste for a brighter smile
Use ZenyumBright™ Active Whitening Serum continuously for 28 days for the best results!
For the perfect daily routine, use ZenyumBright™ Active Whitening Serum with your ZenyumBright™ Instant Colour Corrector
→ Warning:
Not intended for use by children
For use as per direction stated in the user manual
For adult use only. Not for use if you are pregnant or breastfeeding
Stop immediately if you experience any tooth sensitivity or gum irritation
→ Customer Service:
Issues or concerns? Contact us through chat and click on Shop Agent.

services.title: 100% Authentic
services.description: Shopee Mall products are guaranteed 100% authentic, and are sourced directly from brands and authorised distributors. If you receive an inauthentic product, you may request for a 2x refund.

services.title: Fulfilled by Shopee
services.description: Fulfilled by Shopee is an exclusive service where you can enjoy fast delivery and reliable quality.

services.title: 15-Day Free Returns
services.description: Free returns can be requested within 15 days from the date of delivery. To qualify for change of mind returns, items must be in original condition, with packaging and labels intact (including free gifts) and safety seals unbroken. Applicable to selected items. T&Cs apply.

services.title: Product Liability Protection
services.description: Protect yourself from adverse effects arising from use/consumption of product
